title: Skin Problem 皮肤问题
scene: Jack脸上长了痘痘去看皮肤科医生。

lines.en: Doctor, I have some red bumps on my face.
lines.zh: 医生，我脸上长了一些红色的痘痘。

lines.en: How long have you had them?
About one month. They will not go away.
lines.zh: 大约一个月了。一直不好。

lines.en: Do you touch your face a lot with your hands?
Yes, I think I do. Is that bad?
lines.zh: 是的，我想是的。这不好吗？

lines.en: Your hands have a lot of germs. Try not to touch your face.
lines.zh: 手上有很多细菌。尽量不要摸脸。

lines.en: Wash your face twice a day with warm water.
Yes, use this cream every night before bed.
lines.zh: 需要，每晚睡前涂这个药膏。
